scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names api,web,app --prefix-colors cyan,magenta,green "pnpm -C .. run dev:api" "pnpm -C .. run dev:web" "wait-on tcp:3000 && electron ."
scripts.package:win: pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:web && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.package:mac: pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:web && electron-builder --mac dmg
scripts.package:linux: pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:web && electron-builder --linux AppImage
